name: GPT Live 1
description: GPT Live 1 is OpenAI's full-duplex voice model for ChatGPT Voice, designed for continuous bidirectional audio conversations that can listen, speak, pause, interrupt, and delegate deeper work while the conversation continues.

details.name: source_status
details.value: OpenAI announced GPT-Live-1 on July 8, 2026 for ChatGPT Voice. API availability is planned soon but no stable API model documentation or pricing is published yet.

details.name: chatgpt_availability
details.value: Rolling out globally across iOS, Android, and ChatGPT.com. GPT-Live-1 is the default ChatGPT Voice model for Go, Plus, and Pro users.

details.name: api_availability
details.value: OpenAI says API support is planned soon; provider model ID, pricing, and gateway availability are not confirmed.

details.name: background_model
details.value: GPT-Live-1 Instant uses GPT-5.5 Instant in the background; Medium and High use GPT-5.5 Thinking with medium and high reasoning effort.

details.name: reported_capabilities
details.value: Full-duplex continuous interaction, interruption handling, better listening during pauses and background noise, live translation, visual answer cards, and delegation to frontier models for search or deeper reasoning.

page_notice.markdown: GPT Live 1 is available in ChatGPT Voice for Go, Plus, and Pro users. OpenAI says API support is planned soon, but has not confirmed a stable API model ID, pricing, or AI Stats Gateway availability.
